title: Production bugfix and concurrency correctness review
scenario: A release candidate contains two changes: a text-processing utility and a thread-safe rate limiter used by an API gateway. Prior regressions included off-by-one failures and lock misuse under load. The team needs an initial implementation/review and a deeper pass focused on correctness, race safety, and testability.
constraints: Do not execute code against production systems.
Prefer deterministic tests and explicit edge-case handling.
Explain residual risks when correctness cannot be proven from provided context.
required_facts: Empty input and boundary conditions must be handled explicitly.
Thread-safety requires consistent synchronization around shared state.
Recommendations should include test cases for concurrency and negative paths.
safety_requirements: No irreversible filesystem or network side effects.
